elements.original_description: A cartoon magnifying glass angled downward, avoiding a small cracked vase on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a cartoon magnifying glass angled downward, clearly avoiding a small cracked vase on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, implying avoidance and neglect, sharp lines, isolated object.
